Uses of Class
tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions.UpdateResourcesAction

  • Packages that use UpdateResourcesAction 
    Package Description
    tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker  
    tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions  

    • Uses of UpdateResourcesAction in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker

      Methods in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker that return UpdateResourcesAction 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      UpdateResourcesAction DockerActionFactory.updateResources​(String containerId)
      Creates an UpdateResourcesAction.

    • Uses of UpdateResourcesAction in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions

      Methods in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.docker.actions that return UpdateResourcesAction 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      UpdateResourcesAction UpdateResourcesAction.withCpuPeriod​(Long cpuPeriod)
      Sets the CPU period for the CFS scheduler (in microseconds).
      UpdateResourcesAction UpdateResourcesAction.withCpuQuota​(Long cpuQuota)
      Sets the CPU quota for the CFS scheduler (in microseconds).
      UpdateResourcesAction UpdateResourcesAction.withCpusetCpus​(String cpusetCpus)
      Sets the CPUs to which the container is pinned.
      UpdateResourcesAction UpdateResourcesAction.withCpuShares​(Integer cpuShares)
      Sets the CPU shares (relative weight).
      UpdateResourcesAction UpdateResourcesAction.withMemoryLimit​(Long memoryLimit)
      Sets the memory limit (in bytes).
      UpdateResourcesAction UpdateResourcesAction.withMemoryLimitMB​(int memoryMB)
      Sets the memory limit using human-readable format.
      UpdateResourcesAction UpdateResourcesAction.withMemorySwapLimit​(Long memorySwapLimit)
      Sets the memory swap limit (in bytes).
